# Azure Diagrams Skill (Minimal)

**Routing Table** — Routes diagram requests to drawio (architecture), python-diagrams (charts/data viz), or mermaid (inline markdown).

**Decision Tree** — Data viz → python-diagrams; Azure icons needed → drawio; inline markdown → mermaid; default → drawio.

**Scope** — This skill does NOT generate diagrams; load the target skill (drawio, python-diagrams, mermaid) instead.

Read `SKILL.md` or `SKILL.digest.md` for full content.
